job.title: Experienced QA Tester
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our QA team in Avignon to ensure the quality of our clients' applications. You define and execute test strategies, automate test scenarios, and contribute to continuous improvement.
mission.1: Define the test strategy (functional, non-functional, security)
mission.2: Write test plans and test cases
mission.5: Analyse results and write test reports
mission.6: Collaborate with development and business teams
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science or software quality
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in tests logiciels
profile.3: Proficiency in testing tools (Selenium, Cypress, JMeter)
profile.4: Knowledge of Agile methods and TDD/BDD
